reference: If you do not have any problems passing urine, your issue is unlikely to be caused by the stone. If it were a stone impaction, urine flow would also be affected. Are you married? If so, how was your experience during intercourse? Stone impaction causing a blockage for seminal flow is very unlikely to occur. I hope this clears your doubt.
